S.FORM: 140 amihcan hanca matenes tuwaca 140ŚĎ®ŚĻīÁīÄŚŅĶ kakiliiman 140 amihcan hanca matenes tuwaca, nika makadateng tina kawawan haw, cuenut tu ku balucu' ahican a caay pakadateng, ahican amupawan ku tuka nu balucu' kya acaay tu kalalum ku balucu'. hanca mahida tu amin kuni dateng nu pinacadan. nika paymihmihcan katukuhan tu ku puu' nu mihcan sa makadateng tu tina kawawan, ahayni kabelec kya tawya amapawan. - , cuenut tu ku balucu'ŚŅÉÁźÜŚįĪťõ£ťĀé ahican a caay pakadateng , . nilacul == namakayniay a nasulitan nasakamuan atu natinengan ==
S.PHON: *** amińß ¶an ńßan ¶a mat…ôn…ôs tuwa ¶a ******* kakir~…ĺiiman *** amińß ¶an ńßan ¶a mat…ôn…ôs tuwa ¶a, nika makadat…ôŇč tina kawawan ńßaw, ¶u…ônut tu ku bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° ańßi ¶an a ¶aaj pakadat…ôŇč, ańßi ¶an amupawan ku tuka nu bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° kja a ¶aaj tu kar~…ĺar~…ĺum ku bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ °. ńßan ¶a mańßida tu amin kuni dat…ôŇč nu pina ¶adan. nika pajmińßmińß ¶an katukuńßan tu ku puu Ē~ ° nu mińß ¶an sa makadat…ôŇč tu tina kawawan, ańßajni kab…ôr~…ĺ…ô ¶ kja tawja amapawan. - , ¶u…ônut tu ku bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ °***** ańßi ¶an a ¶aaj pakadat…ôŇč , . nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺ == namakajniaj a nasur~…ĺitan nasakamuan atu natin…ôŇčan ==
S.FORM: 140 amihcan hanca matenes tuwaca 140ŚĎ®ŚĻīÁīÄŚŅĶ kakiliiman 140 amihcan hanca matenes tuwaca, nika makadateng tina kawawan haw, cuenut tu ku balucu' ahican a caay pakadateng, ahican amupawan ku tuka nu balucu' kya acaay tu kalalum ku balucu'. hanca mahida tu amin kuni dateng nu pinacadan. nika paymihmihcan katukuhan tu ku puu' nu mihcan sa makadateng tu tina kawawan, ahayni kabelec kya tawya amapawan. - , cuenut tu ku balucu'ŚŅÉÁźÜŚįĪťõ£ťĀé ahican a caay pakadateng , . nilacul == namakayniay a nasulitan nasakamuan atu natinengan ==
